---
name: Refactor
about: Refactor code without changing behavior
labels: refactor
---

### Summary
- What area was refactored and why?

### Changes
- High-level list of structural/tech debt improvements

### Risk/Impact
- Why behavior should remain the same; areas to watch

### How to Test
1. Steps or flows that should still work
2. Any performance considerations

### Linked Issues
- Relates to #

### Checklist
- [ ] I ran `yarn lint` and fixed issues
- [ ] I updated or added tests if coverage changed
- [ ] No functional changes were introduced
